'''mangojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zeamet|zeamet]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-ng-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zeamet|zeamet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| mangojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:mængejeth|mængejeth]] || [[word:mængejej|mængejej]] || [[word:mængejesh|mængejesh]] || [[word:mængeje|mængeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:mangongojoth|mangongojoth]] || [[word:mangongojoj|mangongojoj]] || [[word:mangongojosh|mangongojosh]] || [[word:mangongojo|mangongojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:mangojoth|mangojoth]] || [[word:mangojoj|mangojoj]] || [[word:mangojosh|mangojosh]] || [[word:mangojo|mangojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:mangofjoth|mangofjoth]] || [[word:mangofjoj|mangofjoj]] || [[word:mangofjosh|mangofjosh]] || [[word:mangofjof|mangofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:mangojotho|mangojotho]] || [[word:mangojojo|mangojojo]] || [[word:mangojosho|mangojosho]] || [[word:mangojoko|mangojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:mangojoth|mangojoth]] || [[word:mangojoj|mangojoj]] || [[word:mangojosh|mangojosh]] || [[word:mangojo|mangojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:mangojothol|mangojothol]] || [[word:mangojojol|mangojojol]] || [[word:mangojoshol|mangojoshol]] || [[word:mangojokol|mangojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:mangojothotho|mangojothotho]] || [[word:mangojojojo|mangojojojo]] || [[word:mangojoshosho|mangojoshosho]] || [[word:mangojoko|mangojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:mangojothon|mangojothon]] || [[word:mangojojon|mangojojon]] || [[word:mangojoshon|mangojoshon]] || [[word:mangojokon|mangojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:mangojothoro|mangojothoro]] || [[word:mangojojoro|mangojojoro]] || [[word:mangojoshoro|mangojoshoro]] || [[word:mangojokoro|mangojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
